# tiny-transformers
Minimal from-scratch implementation of a tiny single-block transformer to showcase internals of Attention mechanism.
Trains using SPSA locally, no external dependencies nor API calls.
MLP/LayerNorm/residuals etc have been omitted, this is pure attention.

## Usage
Configure an example (model learns a simple aa|bb|aa|bb|.... sequence in this case):

```go
	t := trainModel(ctx, []rune("aa|bb|aa|bb|aa|bb"), 4, seed, 35000, 0.05, 0.0001)
```

Run in the terminal:

```
$ go run .
Model 0 has loss 0.2295
Model 1 has loss 0.3126
Model 2 has loss 0.2455
Model 3 has loss 0.1936
The winner is 3! (300 parameters, d_model 11, ctx 8, vocab 3, 0.1936 loss)
Seed used 1769457422389850537

Enter context, up to 8 chars: aa|bb|aa
```
